title: The Straw Hats Split the Battlefield
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the straw hats split the battlefield.
scene: The scene follows the straw hats split the battlefield, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You knew I murdered your mother ....?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What nonsense is this, Shirahoshii ...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Father! You must be strong ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: *Pant* ... *Pant*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: urgh hhh..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Drip drip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A few years after the incident

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Megalo told me everything that happened ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He used to be a pet of the Neptune army, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was there that day, and he witnessed it all....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Someone who

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shira- Hoshi ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Megalo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Rro hhh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, Princess Shirahoshii....!! Why did you not tell us of this ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Because ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: thought that telling others would only cause them to hate him deeply....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that is something my mother would never have wished for...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was the final promise ... that I made to my mother....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that no matter who the culprit may be...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: ...we must not give in to hatred!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So no matter who... is responsible for this...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: I would never wish for you to be consumed by anger and hatred on my account...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You mean ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: For these ten long years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...you have protected our mother's wishes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...by bearing that know- ledge alone ....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Concealing the truth in your own heart, locked away in shell tower ....?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: to bear no hatred for the killer of one's own mother?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if it was her mother's final dying wish... to actually honour it should be almost impossible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: NEVE AVE I met ICH A PURE ID HONEST GIRL...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Have I such a and ho girl..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Not one among us can compare

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jahaha Hahaha Hahah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How dare you laugh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: OHHHH, Megalo...!!! I must thank you ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ..for choosing to reveal your secret only to this foolish brat...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Had you told any other, our plan would have been ruined!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jaha Hahaha hahah !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen to me, Shirahoshi!! Your decision was nothing but stupidity!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks to your refusal to hate me, this entire kingdom will fall!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Thanks to you, Shirahoshii, your father, your brothers, and all your loyal subjects are going to die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No!!! Don't listen to this fiend, Princess!!! Your decision was no mistake!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jahah Ahaha hah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Like hell it wasn't !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: YABUGAME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aaaa Hihih!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: King Neptune!!! The Princess !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Jaha Hahaha Hah!!!

summary: The Straw Hats Split the Battlefield. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
